title: Simplistic
description: A very simplistic resourcepack made for bedwars.
body:
# Simplistic

A very simplistic resource pack made for bedwars. It currently only changes a few textures but more may be added in a future version!

## Blocks changed

- All Wool
- Diamond
- Emerald
- Gold
- Iron

## Items changed

- Diamond
- Emerald
- Gold
- Iron
